title: nie-tui main.rs: CLI args, terminal init, panic hook
description:
**What:** Implement tui/src/main.rs — clap CLI argument parsing, terminal initialization (crossterm raw mode + alternate screen), panic hook that restores terminal, and startup sequence.

**Algorithm:**
1. Define Cli struct with clap::Parser:
   - --relay URL (default ws://127.0.0.1:3210/ws, from config.toml or flag)
   - --keyfile PATH (default: data_dir/identity.key)
   - --data-dir PATH (override XDG data dir)
   - --network [mainnet|testnet] (default: testnet)
   - --lightwalletd URL
   - --proxy URL (socks5h://... for Tor)
   - --insecure (hidden, skip TLS cert check)
   - --no-passphrase (hidden, skip passphrase)
2. #[tokio::main] async fn main() -> anyhow::Result<()>:
   a. Parse Cli args.
   b. Load AppConfig from config_dir (use nie_cli_lib::config::AppConfig).
   c. Resolve relay URL: flag > config > default.
   d. Resolve keyfile path: flag > data_dir/identity.key.
   e. Load identity: nie_core::keyfile::load_identity(&keyfile, no_passphrase)?.
   f. Extract hpke keys before moving identity: let hpke_secret = identity.hpke_secret_bytes(); let hpke_pub = identity.hpke_pub_key_bytes();
   g. Set up panic hook BEFORE terminal init:
      std::panic::set_hook(Box::new(|info| {
          // restore terminal synchronously
          let _ = crossterm::terminal::disable_raw_mode();
          let _ = crossterm::execute!(std::io::stderr(), crossterm::terminal::LeaveAlternateScreen);
          // print panic info to stderr (NOT stdout, which is the terminal)
          eprintln!("panic: {info}");
      }));
   h. Enable raw mode: crossterm::terminal::enable_raw_mode()?
   i. Execute EnterAlternateScreen: crossterm::execute!(stdout, crossterm::terminal::EnterAlternateScreen)?
   j. Create Terminal: let mut terminal = ratatui::Terminal::new(CrosstermBackend::new(std::io::stdout()))?
   k. Create MlsClient: nie_core::mls::MlsClient::new(&identity.pub_id().0)?
   l. Create AppState::new(identity.pub_id().0, hpke_secret, mls_client).
   m. Connect with retry: transport::connect_with_retry(relay, identity, insecure, proxy).
   n. Call run(&mut terminal, &mut state, conn).await? (event loop, defined in event.rs).
   o. On exit (run() returns): restore terminal.
      crossterm::execute!(stdout, crossterm::terminal::LeaveAlternateScreen)?;
      crossterm::terminal::disable_raw_mode()?;
3. Restore terminal on both normal exit and panic — never leave raw mode active.

**Defensive programming rules:**
- Panic hook must run synchronously — no async code in hook.
- Panic hook writes to stderr, not stdout (stdout is the terminal in alternate screen mode).
- Never log key material. identity must be moved into transport before any logging.
- Validate relay URL starts with ws:// or wss:// before connecting.
- If terminal init fails, DO NOT leave partial state — restore before propagating error.
- Ensure raw mode is disabled even if EnterAlternateScreen fails.

**Agent team:** Standard (R+I+V). R reads cli/src/main.rs for flag patterns and nie-core/keyfile.rs. I implements main.rs. V runs cargo build -p nie-tui.

**Tests:** Integration test: run nie-tui --help exits 0; cargo build -p nie-tui succeeds; test that missing keyfile gives a clear error (not a panic).
acceptance_criteria: cargo build -p nie-tui exits 0; nie-tui --help shows all required flags; nie-tui without a valid identity.key prints clear error and exits non-zero
